error.signature: Verification failed: LLM cited non-existent source

verdict.summary: LLM generated fake citations, URLs, or references that do not exist.

dead_ends.action: Ask the LLM to only cite real sources
dead_ends.why_fails: LLMs cannot reliably distinguish real from fabricated sources.

dead_ends.action: Verify URLs by checking HTTP status only
dead_ends.why_fails: 404s catch some fakes but plausible-looking URLs may resolve to wrong content.

workarounds.action: Use RAG to provide real sources for the LLM to cite
workarounds.how: Retrieve relevant documents first; constrain citations to provided sources

workarounds.action: Post-process to verify all citations against a known database
workarounds.how: Check DOIs, ISBN, or URL content matches claimed information
